title: Switchy & Pufferfish Skills Compatibility
description: Pufferfish skills component for switchy 3.0 and onward
body:
_<center>**Requires [Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) and [FFAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgified-fabric-api) on (neo)forge.**</center>_

Simple implementation of pufferfish skills as a [switchy](https://modrinth.com/mod/switchy) component.
The added "skills" component will switch **everything** in pufferfish skills. Can be used to play multiple classes.

![Skills appearing as a component](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da0c1ee405841de1f8803a33695c44eb9fbe6f93.png)
